name: Natural Wood Kids' Bookcase - Pillowfort™
description: Create a cozy reading nook for your kid with this Natural Wood Kids' Bookcase from Pillowfort™. Supported by a wooden frame, this front-facing bookcase features four shelves that allow them to stack books with covers facing front. Great for helping encourage reading, this bookcase's natural wood tone will look great paired with any existing decor in their room.
